name: workerhelper
description: WorkerHelper: a doc-driven AI coding workflow skill suite — locate code via feature route maps and route execution by task scale.

interface.shortDescription: Doc-driven AI coding workflow: locate code via route maps, route by task scale
interface.longDescription: WorkerHelper guides agent work through worker-lookup (code location via feature route map), design, plan, exec-plan, worker-debug, and worker-sync — scaling workflow depth by task size.
